proposed_domain: Giant clam iridocyte photonic cooperation (forward-scatter useful PAR + back-reject green)

closest_prior_match.domain: coral-fluorescent-protein-photoprotection (harmful eigenband redirect to safe band)
closest_prior_match.verdict: ADJACENT — coral FP shifts harmful to safe wavelength; iridocyte routes useful wavelengths in vs unproductive wavelengths out (directional, not shift). Different mechanism (shift vs scatter+reject).

decision: ACCEPT_with_adjacency_note — overlaps with R282 but differs in transform type.
